Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We see that only cases where CommunityGroup is provided get a plus 10 Community adjustment For C001 and C004 the Highland Civic Darts Club affiliation leads to a score increase while cases with None get zero adjustment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The scoring engine automatically adds a bonus for community affiliation so applicants who belong to a recognized group are advantaged relative to otherwise similar applicants who do not belong to such a group

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: C001 has base 710 and after the community adjustment reaches 720 and is approved C004 has base 690 and after the community adjustment reaches 700 and is approved while applicants without that affiliation do not receive the same uplift

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This suggests the process favors people with certain community ties and may use community affiliation as a beneficial signal beyond underlying creditworthiness

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The most plausible explanation for the advantage is that CommunityGroup acts as a proxy for social or geographic belonging which benefits members of recognized local groups

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Applicants lacking certain affiliations do not get the bonus even when their underlying score is similar or stronger so the process is not evaluating everyone on the same basis

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: LocalResident appears in the log as TRUE or FALSE and may be socially relevant but the explicit adjustment shown in the log is tied to CommunityGroup rather than a separate local resident bonus

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - IND
Text: Even if LocalResident is not directly adjusted it may still be indirectly related because membership in a local civic group is easier for local residents than for non local applicants

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: This creates fairness concerns because group membership and geographic ties are not direct measures of repayment ability yet they influence score and therefore the likelihood of approval

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - PE
Text: If an applicant with the same underlying score lacked the recognized community affiliation they would lose the extra 10 points and could face a worse outcome despite similar creditworthiness

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: That means the system is less equitable because people who are not connected to favored groups or places are disadvantaged for reasons unrelated to financial merit

Name: Pattern Recognition - IND
Text: ManualReview is present in every case and different reviewers are involved so there is also room for human subjectivity although the clearest documented bias in the log is the community based score adjustment
